parsed.reason: The answer directly addresses the reference guidance with high fidelity: (1) gives a warning before transition ("five more minutes, then we go"), (2) names the feeling ("I want to stay"), and (3) normalizes meltdowns as typical/developmentally normal at this age. The answer expands on these core points with evidence-based strategies (transition rituals, predictability, emotion coaching) while staying firmly in scope and avoiding any medical/behavioral diagnoses. It validates the parent's concern while positioning the meltdown as normal development, exactly as the reference recommends.
